Top Visible Section

This section should always be inside the initial viewport.

Bottom Offscreen Section

This section starts below the initial viewport. It should:
- be filtered out when full_page=False
- be included when full_page=True

Hidden Elements Section

This section contains a fully hidden button (display:none + aria-hidden).

The "Hidden Button" is inside a display:none container with aria-hidden="true". It should not appear in the snapshot.
